editions.name: The Sea Blue Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Sea Blue Edition with the unique taste of Juneberry
editions.alt_text: Red Bull The Sea Blue Edition - Image

editions.name: The Pink Edition Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Pink Edition: Energy drink without sugar with the taste of raspberries and other fruits complemented by exciting herbal notes of verbena

editions.name: The Red Edition
editions.flavor_description: Get ready for an exceptional taste experience. Red Bull Red Edition with the taste of Watermelon is back

editions.name: The Ice Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Ice Edition brings the taste of blueberries, Vanilla and ice fresh notes of eucalyptus

editions.name: Energy Drink
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Energy Drink is appreciated worldwide by top athletes, students, in highly demanding professions and also during long drives

editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Wings without sugar: Red Bull Sugarfree is Red Bull Energy Drink completely without sugar

editions.name: The Peach Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Peach Edition combines the taste of White Peach with a hint of citrus peel and floral notes

editions.name: The Summer Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Summer Edition gives you wings with the fresh taste of sudachi lime

editions.name: The Apricot Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Apricot Edition offers a perfect blend of Apricot and Strawberry with a subtle hint of Peach
